modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a field technician and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be no spelling errors and some contradictory ordering.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Difficulty editing cells and entering expressions in Excel.

full_description_text: The user is unable to edit cells or input expressions in Excel. This issue arose while attempting to modify data within a spreadsheet. The technician needs assistance to resolve this problem efficiently.
short_description: Difficulty editing cells and entering expressions in Excel.
description: The user is unable to edit cells or input expressions in Excel. This issue arose while attempting to modify data within a spreadsheet. The technician needs assistance to resolve this problem efficiently.
